DP.508.0000:
A single Berry will grow into a plant
that makes several Berries.\f
By planting one, there will be more
and more Berries in the world.\f
I hope you will help us spread more
Berries everywhere!\f
DP.508.0001:
Please come by again tomorrow.
I’ll pick a different Berry for you.\f
Please plant that Berry in soft,
earthy soil!
DP.508.0002:
Trainer, please water Berries using
this Sprayduck watering can.\f
DP.508.0003:
Use that Sprayduck to water the soil
where you’ve planted Berries.\f
You should also water Berry plants
while they are growing.
DP.508.0004:
Hello!\f
Would you like to exchange your
Berries for some Accessories?
DP.508.0005:
Thank you so much for trading us so
many Berries!
DP.508.0010:
Oh, you can’t carry any more
than that.
DP.508.0013:
Wow! I traded away every single
Accessory I had!
